languages.text: {n}Арджента с горечью смотрит на солдата, словно видит рану, которую не перевязать. Ее голос наполнен торжественным фатализмом.{/n} "Невыносимо видеть, как здешних солдат поразила одна из самых гнусных и заразных болезней — страх! Не подхвати и ты ее, {name}."

traits.locale_text: {n}Арджента с горечью смотрит на солдата, словно видит рану, которую не перевязать. Ее голос наполнен торжественным фатализмом.{/n} "Невыносимо видеть, как здешних солдат поразила одна из самых гнусных и заразных болезней — страх! Не подхвати и ты ее, {name}."
traits.speaker: ArgentaCompanion

languages.text: {n}Argenta regards the soldier with a bitterness born of witnessing a wound beyond healing. Her voice is thick with solemn fatalism.{/n} "It is unbearable to see these soldiers afflicted by one of the most foul and contagious diseases imaginable: fear! Do not catch it yourself, {name}."
languages.original_text: {n}Арджента с горечью смотрит на солдата, словно видит рану, которую не перевязать. Ее голос наполнен торжественным фатализмом.{/n} "Невыносимо видеть, как здешних солдат поразила одна из самых гнусных и заразных болезней — страх! Не подхвати и ты ее, {name}."

languages.text: {n}Argenta mira al soldado con la amargura de quien observa una herida incurable. Su voz se llena de fatalidad solemne.{/n} «Es insoportable ver a estos soldados afligidos por uno de los trastornos más viles y contagiosos que hay: ¡el miedo! Tenga cuidado de no contraerlo, {name}».
languages.original_text: {n}Argenta regards the soldier with a bitterness born of witnessing a wound beyond healing. Her voice is thick with solemn fatalism.{/n} "It is unbearable to see these soldiers afflicted by one of the most foul and contagious diseases imaginable: fear! Do not catch it yourself, {name}."

traits.locale_text: {n}Argenta mira al soldado con la amargura de quien observa una herida incurable. Su voz se llena de fatalidad solemne.{/n} «Es insoportable ver a estos soldados afligidos por uno de los trastornos más viles y contagiosos que hay: ¡el miedo! Tenga cuidado de no contraerlo, {name}».

languages.text: {n}阿洁塔望着那士兵，神色苦涩，仿佛目睹了一道再难愈合的伤口。她的声音沉重，满含着庄严的宿命感。{/n}“眼睁睁看着这些士兵被一种最为污秽、极具传染性的恶疾所折磨，实在令人难以忍受——这种传染病就是恐惧！{name}，你可千万别染上。”
languages.original_text: {n}Argenta regards the soldier with a bitterness born of witnessing a wound beyond healing. Her voice is thick with solemn fatalism.{/n} "It is unbearable to see these soldiers afflicted by one of the most foul and contagious diseases imaginable: fear! Do not catch it yourself, {name}."

traits.locale_text: {n}阿洁塔望着那士兵，神色苦涩，仿佛目睹了一道再难愈合的伤口。她的声音沉重，满含着庄严的宿命感。{/n}“眼睁睁看着这些士兵被一种最为污秽、极具传染性的恶疾所折磨，实在令人难以忍受——这种传染病就是恐惧！{name}，你可千万别染上。”

languages.text: {n}Argenta observe les soldats avec l'amertume de celle qui se trouve face à une blessure mortelle. Sa voix est empreinte d'un fatalisme solennel :{/n} « Il m'est insupportable de voir ces soldats infectés par la pire et la plus contagieuse des maladies imaginables : la peur! Prenez garde à ne pas l'attraper, {name}. »
languages.original_text: {n}Argenta regards the soldier with a bitterness born of witnessing a wound beyond healing. Her voice is thick with solemn fatalism.{/n} "It is unbearable to see these soldiers afflicted by one of the most foul and contagious diseases imaginable: fear! Do not catch it yourself, {name}."

traits.locale_text: {n}Argenta observe les soldats avec l'amertume de celle qui se trouve face à une blessure mortelle. Sa voix est empreinte d'un fatalisme solennel :{/n} « Il m'est insupportable de voir ces soldats infectés par la pire et la plus contagieuse des maladies imaginables : la peur! Prenez garde à ne pas l'attraper, {name}. »

languages.text: {n}Argenta, askere iyileşmez bir yaraya tanık olmaktan doğan bir acıyla bakıyor. Sesi ağır bir kadercilikle dolu.{/n} "Bu askerlerin hayal edilebilecek en iğrenç ve bulaşıcı hastalıklardan birine, yani korkuya yakalandığını görmek dayanılmaz! Sakın sen de kapma {name}."
languages.original_text: {n}Argenta regards the soldier with a bitterness born of witnessing a wound beyond healing. Her voice is thick with solemn fatalism.{/n} "It is unbearable to see these soldiers afflicted by one of the most foul and contagious diseases imaginable: fear! Do not catch it yourself, {name}."

traits.locale_text: {n}Argenta, askere iyileşmez bir yaraya tanık olmaktan doğan bir acıyla bakıyor. Sesi ağır bir kadercilikle dolu.{/n} "Bu askerlerin hayal edilebilecek en iğrenç ve bulaşıcı hastalıklardan birine, yani korkuya yakalandığını görmek dayanılmaz! Sakın sen de kapma {name}."

languages.text: {n}Argenta bedenkt den Soldaten mit einer Bitterkeit, mit der man auch eine unheilbare Wunde betrachtet. Sie spricht mit einem feierlichen Fatalismus.{/n} "Es ist unerträglich, zu sehen, dass diese Soldaten der Reihe nach von der schlimmsten und ansteckendsten aller Krankheiten befallen werden: Furcht! Steck Euch nicht selbst damit an, {name}."
languages.original_text: {n}Argenta regards the soldier with a bitterness born of witnessing a wound beyond healing. Her voice is thick with solemn fatalism.{/n} "It is unbearable to see these soldiers afflicted by one of the most foul and contagious diseases imaginable: fear! Do not catch it yourself, {name}."

Steck Euch nicht selbst damit an, {name}."

languages.text: {n}兵士の傷を目の当たりにして生まれた苦しみを胸に、アルジェンタは重く、運命に翻弄されるような声で語る。「想像を絶する恐ろしい病気に苦しむ兵士たちを目の当たりにするのは耐え難い。君も恐ろしい病気に罹らないように。」{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Argenta regards the soldier with a bitterness born of witnessing a wound beyond healing. Her voice is thick with solemn fatalism.{/n} "It is unbearable to see these soldiers afflicted by one of the most foul and contagious diseases imaginable: fear! Do not catch it yourself, {name}."
